name: Beef Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and sauté until softened.
3. Stir in garlic and mushrooms; cook until the mushrooms are nearly dry.
4. Add ground beef, chili sauce, seasonings, wine, and beef bouillon cubes to the pan. Cook until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
5. Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste, then dust the meat with flour.
6. Place two strips of bacon on each portion of beef tenderloin.
7. Broil the coated beef in a preheated oven at 450°F (232°C) for about 7 minutes per side, or until lightly browned.
8. Cover the meat with remaining bacon and broil for an additional 7 minutes per side.
9. Transfer the meat to a glass baking dish covered with the marinade sauce.
10. Refrigerate overnight.
11. Bake in the preheated oven at 450°F (232°C) until cooked through, about 20 minutes.
